name: on-the-road
description: Jack Kerouac's On the Road (The Original Scroll) — the iconic Beat Generation novel about cross-country journeys, friendship, jazz, and the search for IT.
useCase: Embracing spontaneity, searching for meaning, creative expression, navigating intense friendships, road travel, seeing America.
knownRisks: The novel romanticizes drug use and reckless behavior — read critically
Dean's treatment of women reflects its era — do not mistake description for endorsement
The 'scroll' version contains language that may be offensive to modern readers
